name: CPU 架构
subject: cs
domain_name: 硬件与软件 / Hardware & Software / Hardware & Software
curriculum_points: Understand how and why computers use binary to represent all forms of data
Understand the denary, binary and hexadecimal number systems
Convert between (i) positive denary and positive binary (ii) positive denary and positive hexadecimal (iii) positive hexadecimal and positive binary
Understand how and why hexadecimal is used as a beneficial method of data representation
